title: No UNIQUE constraint on relay nickname — two users can claim the same display name
description: try_set_nickname in relay/src/store.rs enforces only-set-once per pub_id but not uniqueness across pub_ids. The users table has no UNIQUE constraint on nickname. After NFC normalization, a second user can claim 'Alice' even if 'Alice' is already taken. Fix: add UNIQUE constraint on users.nickname and return false on conflict in try_set_nickname.
